headlines.headline: Plevyl Advisors names new head of wireless connectivity division

sentiment.reasoning: Record quarterly revenue growth of 7% is a positive indicator of sustained business performance.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
